title: Crispy Indian Lime Chicken
description: A flavorful and crunchy Indian-inspired chicken dish with a tangy lime flavor.

ingredients.name: crumble (such as naan or roti crumbs)

instructions: Season the chicken with cumin powder and coriander powder.
Heat the ghee or oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the chicken to the pan and cook until browned on both sides.
Transfer the chicken to a baking sheet and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the chicken is baking, mix together the crispy fried onions and crumble.
Once the chicken is done, top it with the onion-crumb mixture.
Drizzle with lime juice and garnish with leaves.
